description: Use this API to return the next multi-section line member branch. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ibus, jbus, ickt = nxtmsl()

error_codes.description: No more branches in multi-section line; ‘IBUS’, ‘JBUS’, and ‘ICKT’ unchanged.
& not the first character of ‘ICKT’; NXTMSL may not be used.
INIMSL was not called; ‘IBUS’, ‘JBUS’, and ‘ICKT’ unchanged.
